transcription.text: I got a cough from this irritated throat and cold. Got congestion. Got 15 seconds? 15 seconds. For Hall's Mentholiptus Decongestant Cough Formula. And Hall's keeps helping your cough for hours. I can feel it. 15 seconds. Hall's. That's fast. Hall's Cough Formula. You can feel it working.
